title: 天皇賞（春）の後に・敗戦の喜び

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Ryan gives it her all, but she loses to
Mejiro McQueen, who has spent her entire life
preparing for the spring Tenno Sho.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
McQueen respects Ryan's effort, and promises
that their next race will be medium
distance—Ryan's specialty.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The next goal is the Takarazuka Kinen, which
decides the spring medium-distance champion.
But will Mejiro Ryan be able to place high enough
in the fan poll to enter?
